title: Hoofdstuk 16 - Wat is responsive design? Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Je pagina er goed laten uitzien op gsm, tablet en desktop.

questions.prompt: What is the main goal of responsive design?

options.label: Use one fixed desktop width everywhere
Make pages adapt to different devices

explanations.overview: Responsive design adapts layout and styling for different screen sizes.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Responsive design adapts layout and styling for different screen sizes.
byOptionId.b: Correct. Responsive design adapts layout and styling for different screen sizes.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. Responsive design adapts layout and styling for different screen sizes.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Responsive design adapts layout and styling for different screen sizes.

questions.prompt: Which rule helps images fit smaller screens?

explanations.overview: max-width: 100% keeps images from overflowing containers.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. max-width: 100% keeps images from overflowing containers.
byOptionId.b: Correct. max-width: 100% keeps images from overflowing containers.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. max-width: 100% keeps images from overflowing containers.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. max-width: 100% keeps images from overflowing containers.
